guidance: Below normal. Warm the baby and recheck; call your doctor if it stays under 36.0 C / 96.8 F.
Typical body temperature for an infant.
Slightly warm. Recheck, remove extra layers, and watch for other symptoms.
Fever. In a baby under 3 months this is urgent — call your doctor right away.
High fever. Contact your doctor; seek urgent care for a young infant or if baby seems very unwell.
